object.script:
--math & input shorthands m,i,o,p = math,input,output,property ign,osn,igb,osb = i.getNumber, o.setNumber, i.getBool, o.setBool pgn,pgb = p.getNumber, p.getBool abs,cos,sin,acos,asin,tan,atan = m.abs, m.cos, m.sin, m.acos, m.asin, m.tan, m.atan pi = m.pi pi2 = pi*2
--Basic Functions function vec(x,y,z) return {x=x or 0,y=y or 0,z=z or 0} end function add(a,b) return vec(a.x+b.x, a.y+b.y, a.z+b.z) end function mult(a,b) return vec(a.x*b.x, a.y*b.y, a.z*b.z) end function multf(a,n) return vec(a.x*n, a.y*n, a.z*n) end function invert(a) return multf(a,-1) end function subt(a,b) return add(a,invert(b)) end function length(a) return m.sqrt(a.x*a.x+a.y*a.y+a.z*a.z) end function divf(a,n) return multf(a,1/n) end function norm(a) return divf(a,length(a)) end function dot(a,b) return a.x*b.x+a.y*b.y+a.z*b.z end function cross(a,b) return vec(a.y*b.z-a.z*b.y, a.z*b.x-a.x*b.z, a.x*b.y-a.y*b.x) end function project(a,b) return multf(norm(b), dot(a, norm(b))) end function reject(a,b) return subt(a, multf(norm(b), dot(a, norm(b)))) end function reflect(a,b,factor) return subt(a, multf(reject(a, b), factor or 2)) end function stoc(hor,ver,d) local d=d or 1 return vec(m.sin(hor)*m.cos(ver)*d, m.cos(hor)*m.cos(ver)*d, m.sin(ver)*d) end
function vecDelta(a,spot) if not vecDeltaTable then vecDeltaTable = {} vecDeltaTable[spot] = {oldVec = vec(),deltaVec = vec()} elseif not vecDeltaTable[spot] then vecDeltaTable[spot] = {oldVec = vec(),deltaVec = vec()} end vecDeltaTable[spot].deltaVec = subt(a,vecDeltaTable[spot].oldVec) vecDeltaTable[spot].oldVec = a
return vecDeltaTable[spot].deltaVec end
function pulse(var,spot) if not pulseTable then pulseTable = {} pulseTable[spot] = {pulse = false,touch = false} elseif not pulseTable[spot] then pulseTable[spot] = {pulse = false,touch = false} end pulseTable[spot].pulse = var ~= pulseTable[spot].touch and var pulseTable[spot].touch = var return pulseTable[spot].pulse end
--initial variables modes = { [1] = "continualprotect", [2] = "activeprotect", [3] = "off" } modecounter = pgn("System Setting") chaffmaxdist = pgn("max dist from chaff (m)") chafflastpos = vec() chafdecay = 360--ticks for chaff to decay chafflife = 0--counts how long last chaff has existed chaffout = false
--small functions function debuglight(bool) osb(2,bool) end function chaff() osb(1,true);chafflastpos = mypos;chafflife = 0;chaffout = true end function lerp(a,b,t) return a * (1-t) + b * t end -- 0 to 1 function clamp(a,lo,hi) return m.min(m.max(a,lo),hi) end
function onTick()
--inputs mypos = vec(ign(1),ign(2),ign(3)) spd = length(vecDelta(mypos,"spd"))*60--tested this, it is accurate chaffdist = lerp(8,chaffmaxdist,clamp(spd,0,10)/10) --how far away chaff can get from you before a new one is popped --lerp between 8m and user set distnace based on speed 0 to 10m/s rwr = igb(1)--may be solid on, may blink
--mode cycling if pulse(igb(2),"cycle") then modecounter = modecounter + 1 if modecounter > 3 then modecounter = 1 end end mode = modes[modecounter]
--output selected mode for i = 1,5 do osb(i,false) end osb(modecounter+1,true)
--main logic loop osb(1,false)--preset to false so chaff function can overwrite it if we should chaff, using this & function for readability if chaffout then chafflife = chafflife + 1 end--if a chaff is in the air, count toward it's decay if chafflife >= chafdecay then--if a chaff has existed for as long as it takes to decay, there isn't a chaff in the air chaffout = false end if mode == "continualprotect" then
if length(subt(chafflastpos,mypos)) >= chaffdist then chaff() else if chafflife >= chafdecay then chaff() end end elseif mode == "activeprotect" then if rwr then if length(subt(chafflastpos,mypos)) >= chaffdist then chaff() else if chafflife >= chafdecay then chaff() end end end end end

microprocessor_definition.name: Passive Datalink
microprocessor_definition.description: Orientation of physics sensor does not matter

object.script: --made by judgementalbird _=nil a,l,e,b=math,input.getNumber,output.setNumber,property.getNumber q=b("Max friendlies")w=b("User number")j=b("Frequency seed")k=b("Encryption seed")n,o=1871759,6393518 g={}a.randomseed(j)u=a.random(n,o)a.randomseed(j)for v=1,q do i=a.random(-605791,605791)for x,s in ipairs(g)do while s==i do i=a.random(-605791,605791)end end g[v]=i end t=g[w]+u g,q,j,n,o=_,_,_,_,_ function r(h)return p(h.f/(3.57*k),h.d/(3.81*k),h.c/(4.19*k))end function p(d,f,c)return{d=d or 0,f=f or 0,c=c or 0}end function onTick()e(4,t)m=r(p(l(1),l(2),l(3)))e(1,m.d)e(2,m.f)e(3,m.c)end

node.label: Switch
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

node.label: Comp
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

node.label: Comp
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

object.script:
--shorthands m,i,o,p,s,T,F = math,input,output,property,screen,true,false ign,osn,igb,osb = i.getNumber, o.setNumber, i.getBool, o.setBool pgn,pgb = p.getNumber, p.getBool abs,cos,sin,floor,atan = m.abs, m.cos, m.sin, m.floor,m.atan pi = m.pi pi2 = pi*2
normalthrottle = pgn("Normal mode..") boostthrottle = pgn("BOOST MODE RAHH")
turngain = pgn("Turn gain")
function onTick() --inputs ad = ign(1) ws = ign(2) ud = ign(4) battery = ign(5) speed = ign(6) --found by plotting required gain in geogebra and using regression tool with polynomial 3rd degree, then just clamped if speed <= 12 then speedturngain = 1 else speedturngain = m.max(m.min(22.96*speed^(-1.36),1),0) end --debug.log("spd: "..speed.." spdturngain: "..speedturngain) boost = igb(3) brake = igb(5)
--mode switch if boost then throttle = boostthrottle else throttle = normalthrottle end
if abs(ws) > 0.05 or abs(ad) > 0.05 then osn(1,ws*throttle * (1 / battery) + (ad*turngain * (1 / battery))*speedturngain)--left motors osn(2,ws*throttle * (1 / battery) - (ad*turngain * (1 / battery))*speedturngain)--right motors osb(1,false) elseif brake then osn(1,0) osn(2,0) osb(1,true) else osn(1,0) osn(2,0) end end

FireT = property.getNumber("Gun Type") FireC = property.getNumber("Guns") C=0 F=0 T=0 function onTick() Fire = input.getBool(1)
C1=false C2=false C3=false C4=false C5=false C6=false C7=false C8=false
if(Fire==true) then T=((1/FireT)/FireC)*60 C=C+1
if(C>=T)then C=0 F=F+1 if(F>=FireC)then F=0 end end if(F==0)then C1=true end if(F==1)then C2=true end if(F==2)then C3=true end if(F==3)then C4=true end if(F==4)then C5=true end if(F==5)then C6=true end if(F==6)then C7=true end if(F==7)then C8=true end end
output.setBool(1, C1) output.setBool(2, C2) output.setBool(3, C3) output.setBool(4, C4) output.setBool(5, C5) output.setBool(6, C6) output.setBool(7, C7) output.setBool(8, C8) end

node.description: The input signal to be processed.
The input signal to be processed.

object.script:
EleSet=0 AzSet=0 Wait=0
function onTick()
AFire = input.getBool(9) ATurret = input.getBool(10) Occupied = input.getBool(11) SeatX = input.getNumber(4) SeatY = input.getNumber(5)
CurrentX = input.getNumber(6) CurrentY = input.getNumber(7)
Radar1D = input.getNumber(1) Radar1X = input.getNumber(2) Radar1Y = input.getNumber(3)
if(Radar1D>0)then Wait = 0*60 Radar1T=true else if (Wait<=0)then Radar1T=false else Wait=Wait-1 end end
UEClamp = property.getNumber("Upper Elevation Clamp") LEClamp = property.getNumber("Lower Elevation Clamp") AClamp = property.getNumber("Azimuth Clamp")
ScanSpeed = property.getNumber("Scan Speed") ScanEl = property.getNumber("Scan Elevation")
FireThreshold = property.getNumber("Firing Threshhold")
MinFire = property.getNumber("Min Engagment Distance") MaxFire = property.getNumber("Max Engagment Distance")
---------------------------------------------------
if(Radar1D>MinFire and Radar1D<MaxFire) then Fire=true AimPass=true else Fire=false AimPass=false end
if(AFire)then output.setBool(1,Fire) else output.setBool(1,false) end ---manual aim/autoturret if(ATurret)then AzZeroDis = Radar1X EleZeroDis = Radar1Y if(Radar1T)then else EleZeroDis = ScanEl end else if(Occupied)then AzZeroDis = SeatX EleZeroDis = SeatY+0.03 else AzZeroDis = SeatX EleZeroDis = SeatY+0.02 end end ---aiming switchbox if(ATurret and AimPass==false)then output.setNumber(1, ScanSpeed) else if(ATurret)then output.setNumber(1, AzZeroDis) -- target found, autoturret active else output.setNumber(1, (((AzZeroDis-CurrentX+1.5)%1)-0.5)*4) end end
output.setBool(2,false)
if(ATurret and AimPass==false)then output.setNumber(2, (ScanEl-CurrentY)*4)
else if(ATurret)then output.setNumber(2, EleZeroDis) -- target found, autoturret active output.setBool(2,true) else output.setNumber(2, (EleZeroDis-CurrentY)*4) end end ---clamps if(ATurret)then if(AClamp~=0)then if(AzZeroDis > AClamp)then output.setNumber(1, AClamp) else if(AzZeroDis < -AClamp)then output.setNumber(1, AClamp) end end end if(UEClamp~=0 and LEClamp~=0)then if(EleZeroDis > UEClamp)then output.setNumber(2, UEClamp) else if(EleZeroDis < LEClamp)then output.setNumber(2, LEClamp) end end end else if(AClamp~=0)then if(AzZeroDis > AClamp)then output.setNumber(1, (AClamp-0.0001-CurrentX)*4) else if(AzZeroDis < -AClamp)then output.setNumber(1, (-AClamp+0.0001-CurrentX)*4) end end end if(UEClamp~=0 and LEClamp~=0)then if(EleZeroDis > UEClamp)then output.setNumber(2, (UEClamp-0.0001-CurrentY)*4) else if(EleZeroDis < LEClamp)then output.setNumber(2, (LEClamp+0.0001-CurrentY)*4) end end end end end

ign = input.getNumber osn = output.setNumber m = math pi2 = m.pi*2 function vec(x,y,z) return {x=x or 0,y=y or 0,z=z or 0} end function add(a,b) return vec(a.x+b.x, a.y+b.y, a.z+b.z) end function sub(a,b) return add(a,invert(b)) end function multf(a,n) return vec(a.x*n, a.y*n, a.z*n) end function divf(a,n) return multf(a,1/n) end function invert(a) return multf(a, -1) end function cross(a,b) return vec(a.y*b.z-a.z*b.y, a.z*b.x-a.x*b.z, a.x*b.y-a.y*b.x) end function stoc(hor,ver,d) local d=d or 1 return vec(m.sin(hor)*m.cos(ver)*d, m.cos(hor)*m.cos(ver)*d, m.sin(ver)*d) end function length(a) return m.sqrt(a.x*a.x+a.y*a.y+a.z*a.z) end function dot(a,b) return a.x*b.x+a.y*b.y+a.z*b.z end
LVGPS = vec(0,0,0) LTGPS = vec(0,0,0) LLGPS = vec(0,0,0)
function onTick() compf = ign(5) * -pi2 --compass sensor with arrow facing forward tiltf = ign(7) * pi2 --tilt sensor facing forward compr = ign(4) * -pi2 --compass sensor with arrow facing right tiltr = ign(6) * pi2 --tilt sensor facing right
fwd=stoc(compf,tiltf) right=stoc(compr,tiltr) up=cross(fwd,invert(right))
localvec = stoc(ign(2)*pi2,ign(3)*pi2,ign(1)) --input horizontal angle, vertical angle, and distance
vehiclevec = vec(ign(8),ign(9),ign(10)) --input the xyz of your vehicle gps (closest to where the detection 0,0,0 is)
relativevec = add(multf(up,localvec.z),add(multf(right,localvec.x),multf(fwd,localvec.y))) --relative to your vehicle
globalvec = add(vehiclevec,relativevec) --global
ShellVel = property.getNumber("Shell Type")
if(input.getBool(1))then osn(30,globalvec.x) osn(31,globalvec.y) osn(32,globalvec.z)
--------------antichaff shit --------------leading
--TMP10 = localvec TMP11 = globalvec TMP12 = vehiclevec
distance = length(localvec) TravelTime = (distance/ShellVel)*80
--LLGPS = multf(sub(localvec,LLGPS),TravelTime) LTGPS = multf(sub(globalvec,LTGPS),TravelTime) LVGPS = sub(vehiclevec,LVGPS)
--localvec= add(localvec,LLGPS) --TMP13 = add(vehiclevec,LVGPS) globalvec = add(add(globalvec,LTGPS),LVGPS)
---global to angles relativevec = sub(globalvec,vehiclevec) localvec = vec(dot(relativevec,right),dot(relativevec,fwd),dot(relativevec,up))
---angles distance = length(localvec)
azimuth = math.atan(localvec.x,localvec.y)/pi2 elevation = math.asin(localvec.z/distance)/pi2
--LLGPS = TMP10 LTGPS = TMP11 LVGPS = TMP12
--------------bal calc
TMP0 = elevation*2*m.pi TMP1 = distance*m.cos(TMP0) TMP2 = distance*m.sin(TMP0) TMP3 = -(15*(TMP1^2))/(ShellVel^2) TMP4 = (-TMP1+m.sqrt((TMP1^2)-4*(TMP3)*(TMP3-TMP2)))/(2*TMP3) y = (m.atan(TMP4)*(2/m.pi)) if (y~=y)then y=elevation end
--------------data output
osn(1,distance)--outputted direclty into the velocity pivots basically osn(2,azimuth) osn(3,y) else osn(1,0) end end
--By Kubson#1138 and WHITEDAWN#7645
